task.action: Fix Prisma DB errors (PostgreSQL stopped), restore DB backup, fix seat numbering bug (totalSeats includes driver seat 1)

constraints.seat_numbering: passenger seats start at 2, seat 1 = driver/staff
constraints.totalSeats_meaning: total van capacity including seat 1 (driver), so passenger count = totalSeats - 1

task.result_summary: 4 tasks completed: (1) Diagnosed Prisma errors — PostgreSQL service was STOPPED, not a code/schema issue. (2) Started postgresql-x64-17 service, dropped+recreated tour_tickets DB, restored from full backup 2026-05-12.sql (24 tables, Trip=48, BusRound=232 rows). (3) Commented out 'บทความ/ประกาศ/FAQ' nav item in navMenu.html. (4) Fixed seat grid bug: API totalSeats=10 means 9 passenger seats (seat 1=driver). Changed 3 files — frontend/pages/booking/seats.html: passengerCount=totalSeats-1, rows=ceil(passengerCount/3), n<=totalSeats; frontend/pages/monitor/monitor.js: apiBase=totalSeats-1 in resolveMonitorMapPassengerSlots + renderSeatMap + setupSeatMapCapSelect; websilte/src/pages/booking/seats.html: chartPassengerSlots=totalSeats-1, busCap=totalSeats-1. Result: totalSeats=10 → shows seats 2-10 (9 slots) instead of 2-11.

known_facts.postgresql_service: postgresql-x64-17 (Windows service, must be started manually on dev machine)
known_facts.seat_rule: totalSeats in BusRound = full van capacity including driver (seat 1). Passenger slots = totalSeats - 1, numbered 2..totalSeats
known_facts.nav_contents_hidden: frontend/components/navMenu.html บทความ/ประกาศ/FAQ commented out
